reason: config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir override bound directly; resolveArtifactRoot skipped
The detached cli-codex child could not connect to its backend; the bounded lineage was completed from first-party sources and local read-only configuration inspection.

focus: official server identity, transport, authorization, and plan eligibility
noveltyJustification: Established the hosted Streamable HTTP endpoint, OAuth protected-resource flow, paid MCP plan gate, REST API-key distinction, and rate-limit baseline from first-party sources.
keyQuestions: What endpoint and transport does the official server expose?
Does MCP use an API key or OAuth?
How does MCP differ from the REST API?
answeredQuestions: The endpoint is https://api.mobbin.com/mcp and the external protocol is Streamable HTTP.
MCP authorization is OAuth/browser-based rather than a user-supplied API key.
MCP access is documented for Pro, Team, and Enterprise.
API-key Bearer auth applies to the separate Team/Enterprise REST API.

graphEvents.label: OAuth and paid MCP plan gate

focus: official skills workflow, search_screens contract, and installation
noveltyJustification: Added the official mobbin-search behavior, query and platform guidance, search_screens response contract, installation paths, and the boundary between retrieval and optional evidence-board writing.
keyQuestions: What concrete search tool and result shape are documented?
How should app, screen, flow, and element research be expressed?
What is the official install path?
answeredQuestions: The public skills repo currently documents mobbin-search.
The concrete MCP call documented by the skill is search_screens, returning screen metadata and inline images.
App, screen, flow, and element intent is expressed through query terms; separate public tool schemas are not confirmed.
The skill can be installed with npx skills add mobbin/skills or by manual clone/copy.
ruledOut: Four separately confirmed app/screen/flow/element tool names
Assuming a result board is part of the read-only transport
Assuming image metadata alone replaces visual inspection

graphEvents.label: Query terms cover app screen flow element intent

focus: read-only Code Mode transport packet, UTCP manual, and sk-design pairing gaps
noveltyJustification: Converted the evidence into a Code Mode-compatible manual and packet contract while preserving the unknown authenticated tool schemas and making runtime discovery an explicit gate.
keyQuestions: What UTCP shape is compatible with this repository?
How can Streamable HTTP be adapted to Code Mode?
What must read-only and Code Mode-only mean?
How should sk-design pair with retrieval?
Which implementation facts still require live validation?
answeredQuestions: Use a mobbin mcp manual with an mcp-remote stdio adapter to the official Streamable HTTP URL because local validation documents stdio/sse shapes but not direct Streamable HTTP.
No API-key env entry is needed; first connection is OAuth/browser authorization.
The transport exposes retrieval through call_tool_chain only and forbids workspace writes.
sk-design owns taste/judgment; mcp-mobbin supplies evidence and never decides design direction.
A live authenticated tools/list and one search_screens smoke call remain required before freezing exact tool names and schemas.
ruledOut: Direct SSE declaration for a Streamable HTTP-only endpoint without runtime support
Hardcoding an unverified full tool inventory
Writing .mobbin evidence boards from the transport

note: Convergence was telemetry only; the loop continued through all configured iterations and did not synthesize early.
